'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=c1X5T0Sq4VljLSrylvxzEyyZrxcWA40SVDhZ9VtlcSM-1771538127-1.0.1.1-7ro0zrIW0oY_ORhTGbTnUetHt0rQbZIB.2.RGlnBU14"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
